company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream provides automated video editing tools for content creators. Our AI-powered platform helps you edit, enhance, caption, and publish videos faster than ever — no editing experience required.

policies.title: Refund Policy
policies.content: We offer refunds within 7 days of purchase. No refunds are available after 7 days. Refund requests must be submitted through our support portal at support.autostream.io.

policies.title: Support Policy
policies.content: 24/7 customer support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support with responses within 24 hours.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
policies.content: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees.

policies.title: Free Trial
policies.content: We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start your trial.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support for export?
faq.answer: AutoStream integrates with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitch, and supports direct uploads. Export formats include MP4, MOV, and WebM.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades apply at the start of the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Does AutoStream work for beginners?
faq.answer: Absolutely. AutoStream is designed for creators of all skill levels. The AI handles complex editing tasks automatically — you just upload your raw footage.

faq.question: What is the difference between Basic and Pro?
faq.answer: Basic gives you 10 videos/month at 720p with email support. Pro gives you unlimited videos at 4K with AI captions, advanced AI editing, priority rendering, custom branding, analytics, and 24/7 support.
